creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 218920
net-mgmt/unifi6: Update to 6.0.28

Hi,

please find the patch attached, it updates net-mgmt/unifi6 to 6.8.28

Changelog:
    * Bugfixes:
      - Fix event handling for UDM-type devices.
      - Skip invalid IP addresses when generating firewall rules to prevent
        reconnecting issue.
      - Make Default AP Group read only.

Build tested on 11.4-RELEASE, 12-STABLE, 13-CURRENT.
